This here blog post, is a review, of the following demo video, that is a demo video of GrapheneOS:

 

“Maybe This Phone ISN’T Just for Criminals - Trying Graphene OS for a Month.” | via Linus Tech Tips  |  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gDR6V5OdnYg

 

In the video, the persona the host Linus says that GrapheneOS starts with 14 apps installed. see screenshot of my screen showing the video stillframe showing the 14 apps:

 

 

 

 

He is saying in the video: ‘...vanadium [browser] is hardened chromium...’

 

Also, the video host says on the GrapheneOS device there is ‘...Accrescent app store...’ . And I cross referenced and found a link to that:

https://accrescent.app/

 

He mentions also '... Organic Maps ...', which he says is an offline map app that is based off of openstreetmap.

I found this link to that:

https://organicmaps.app/news/

Morgan additional note is that, for this app/developer, also saw they published an iOS/iPhone version of this same app. : "Organic Maps" for iOs? YES PLEASE! And so I try it out on my iPhone since I don’t yet have GrapheneOS.

I found this link to that:

https://apps.apple.com/us/app/organic-maps-offline-map/id1567437057

 

Also, the video host the persona Linus says like:

'...[5m.33s. mark] you don't need to privacysplain it to me...'

Morgan note: (chuckles) he he "privacysplain". first time I heard this term. But love it. So then I went down a rabbit hole looking for definition for privacysplain which ended up in this separate blog post:

 

Privacysplain Definition Accepted Urbandictionary - Software Privacy Security Identity 005

https://lemonmama.com/lemonmama/2026/0194%20privacysplain%20definition%20accepted%20urbandictionary.html

 

 

Also, the video persona Linus, says he tried to install all his normal smartphone apps on to GrapheneOS, and he says it was kind of a hassle, because every single app installed prompted a laundry list of what permissions it would be asking for.

So if you want to see a visual of that then do check out Linus’ video folks!

 

Also, persona Linus says, ‘...13m:50s ....if you’re trying to de-google your life...’  

Morgan note: persona Linus is saying GrapheneOS is a good tool if you want to de-google your life. nice!

And special thanks to persona Linus this video, because within a few months of watching this video, I dig in really hard and did make a push and did myself get GrapheneOS working on a device myself. See:

GrapheneOS Working on Pixel 8 - Software Privacy Security Identity 007

https://lemonmama.com/lemonmama/2026/0211%20grapheneos%20on%20pixel%208.html

 

 

 

In conclusion, if you are interested in the above, and much more, then I do recommend you to also watch persona Linus’ video as well. The visuals he presents in the video are priceless and go far beyond what I am mentioning here in this blog post. Besides, he mentions a lot more in the video that I didn’t even mention here in this blog post, so if this stuff interests you then do go check it out! I liked this video, and it stoked my already-budding interest in GrapheneOS.
